'''Ground beetles''' were a species of [[Beetle/Legends|beetles]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]].

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] found a specimen in the [[Grand Theater of Vreni Island]] on the planet [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. It is unknown how it found its way there.

==Appearances==
*{{Film|III}} {{C|deleted scene}}
*{{GalaxiesNGE}}
